Everything You Need To Grow

Our AI-powered platform handles your marketing so you can focus on what you do best — great food.

🤖

AI Growth Assistant

Hungrin automatically creates promotions tailored to your customers using smart criteria, date, and behaviour patterns.

🎯

Promo Automation

Set up campaigns and let Hungrin handle the scheduling, promotion blasting, and ensure you make money on automation.

📊

Real-Time Insights

Fascinating sales data and impact — understand your customers and spot recommendations to grow your sustainability.

🌤️

Weather Sales Insights

Hungrin uses live weather data to suggest timely promotions and help you attract order-free customers on slow days.

Platforms

Hungrin integrates with popular delivery services so you can manage everything without switching systems.
